title: Lost or stolen company device
safe_steps: Confirm device owner, last known location, and whether sensitive data exists.
Do not wait to see if company data is involved.
advanced_steps: Use MDM to lock/wipe if policy allows.
do_not_do: Do not run destructive commands without approval.
Do not ask users to share passwords.
technician_notes: Confirm scope: one user, multiple users, or full site.
Record final fix into the client-specific KB.
